gh_7affd1510d29cbfc03c0f24b.title: Add FileShot.io — secure, zero-knowledge file sharing for remote workers
gh_7affd1510d29cbfc03c0f24b.description:
Hi! Suggesting FileShot.io for the tools section.

FileShot.io: https://fileshot.io
GitHub: https://github.com/FileShot/FileShotZKE
License: MIT

A privacy-first file sharing service for remote workers: encrypt files in the browser with AES-256-GCM before upload. Share a link — the recipient gets the file, without any cloud service having access to your data. No account, no sign-up, free.

Practical for remote workers who need to share sensitive documents, contracts, or files with clients without email attachments or trusting a cloud provider.

gh_7aa289b06873d25053fe1236.title: 徵才:前端工程師兩位-遠距工作每周20小時
gh_7aa289b06873d25053fe1236.description:
🚀 Join the SpeakyParrot Team – We’re Hiring a Frontend Developer! 🦜
🌍 Remote | 2 positions | 🕓 20 hrs/month | 💼 Temporary (3 months, potential to extend) | 💻 TypeScript + Tailwind CSS | 💰 Hourly (rate negotiable)

We’re SpeakyParrot — a young, innovative language learning platform on a mission to make language learning fun, human, and truly effective. No boring grammar drills. No endless vocab lists. Just creative, interactive, real-life learning.
Our small but mighty team of 5 is currently spread across Taiwan, Germany, and the UAE, and we’d love to include you next.

🔧 The Role: Frontend Developer (TypeScript & Tailwind CSS)
We’re looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to help bring our platform to life with beautiful, responsive, and accessible user interfaces. If you're someone who loves clean code, sleek UI, and impactful collaboration—this one's for you.

🛠️ What You'll Do:
- Build and maintain modern frontend components with TypeScript & Tailwind CSS
- Work closely with our backend team (Node.js + PostgreSQL) to integrate features seamlessly
- Ensure responsive, cross-browser, and mobile-friendly design
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
- Participate in code reviews and help keep our codebase top-notch
- Troubleshoot issues and optimize performance across the board

✅ Must-Have Experience:
- 3+ years of professional frontend development
- Proficiency in TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
- Hands-on experience with Tailwind CSS (or similar frameworks)
- Familiarity with modern frameworks like React, Vue, or Angular
- Understanding of responsive design, REST APIs, and version control (Git)
- Comfortable working with Node.js and a basic understanding of PostgreSQL
- Good communication and collaboration skills (English-speaking environment)

⭐ Bonus Points For:
- Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library, etc.)
- Performance tuning and frontend optimization
- Awareness of frontend security best practices

🔍 The Details:
- 🗓 Start Date: As soon as possible
- 🕒 Time Zone Preference: GMT+4 to GMT+12 (or flexible if communication is smooth)
- 🧭 Project Duration: 3 months, with the potential to extend long-term
- 💸 Compensation: Hourly rate (to be discussed)
- 📍 Work Style: Fully remote, flexible, and collaborative
- 💌 Contact: Send your CV/GitHub/portfolio and a short intro to **business@speakyparrot.com**

If you're the right fit, we’ll reach out to initiate the interview process!

🌈 Why Join SpeakyParrot?

- A chance to make a real impact in the ed-tech space
- Collaborate with a tight-knit, international team
- Flexible work culture and meaningful projects
- Build something creative and fun—with people who care
- Check us out 👉 https://speakyparrot.com
